name: python3-django-auditlog
title: python3-django-auditlog
summary: Library for logging changes to Django models
description:
Library for logging changes to Django models
This library records modifications to Django model instances along with the
user responsible for the change. It offers more flexibility compared to
Django's default admin log and provides a JSON summary of modifications,
allowing easy tracking of changes across models. Designed to be simple and
efficient, it minimizes storage use by avoiding full version control, instead
focusing on logging key attributes and actions for each change. It
communicates directly with Django models to capture and store these logs,
integrating seamlessly into Django-based applications.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-django-auditlog because Library for logging changes to Django models.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-django-auditlog as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-django-auditlog with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-django-auditlog --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
